text:
Netlify does NOT support server-side rewrites at arbitrary paths like /llms.txt. The standard FlowBlinq path on Netlify is to use a _redirects file for proxying.

Here are the steps to set it up:

1. **Create a _redirects file** in your project root if you don't have one already.
2. **Add the following line** to the _redirects file:
   ```
   /llms.txt https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{slug}/llms.txt 200
   ```
   Replace `{slug}` with your actual FlowBlinq slug.
3. **Deploy your changes** to Netlify.

This will allow your Netlify site to serve the llms.txt file correctly. If you need further assistance, feel free to ask!
